case_title: SUTTERR ELYSEES CORP. et al VS SADALLAH KHALIL, DR. et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUTTERR ELYSEES CORP. BIERRE HERVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SADALLAH KHALIL, DR. FRENCH EPI INC. $2,499.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY SUTTERR ELYSEES CORP. BIERRE HERVE AS TO DEFENDANT SADALLAH KHALIL, DR. FRENCH EPI INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRENCH EPI INC.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-18-1992, GRANTED
